name: Chocolate Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend together the eggs, vanilla extract, and milk until well combined.
2. Melt the margarine over low heat in a saucepan.
3. Add cocoa powder, sugar, and flour to the melted margarine. Stir until smooth.
4. Gradually add this mixture to the egg mixture, about a tablespoon at a time, stirring continuously after each addition.
5. Pour the batter into an unbaked pie shell.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until firm.
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
Preparation Time: 0:00
